title: Golden Grilled Malaysian Khus Khus Skewers
description: Charred and cheesy Malaysian khus khus skewers with a side of spicy ferment kimchi, perfect for a festive dinner party, dairy-free-friendly
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Soak the bamboo skewers in water for at least 30 minutes before grilling.
Thread the khus khus, vegan mozzarella, and ferment kimchi onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with coconut milk and sprinkle with lemongrass, galangal, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the grill with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are charred and the cheese is melted and pulled.
Serve the skewers hot with a side of spicy ferment kimchi and a sprinkle of khus khus.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 10 skewers.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
